---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for this project.
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

### Use Case
A clear and concise description of the user problem or use-case this feature solves.

### Proposed Tool or Parameter
- **Proposed Tool Name (if new):** `pi.*.*`
- **Proposed Parameters:** (Name, Type, Required, Description)

### Mapped Upstream PI Web API Endpoints
What endpoints does this feature map to? (e.g. `GET /piwebapi/streams/{webId}/summary`)

### Security & Authentication Implications
- Does this tool require admin access or read-only/write access?
- Are there compatibility constraints (e.g. system-protected resource incompatible with Bearer tokens)?
- What caching behaves best for this request?
